## 📝 Pull Request Description

### What does this PR do?

A clear and concise description of what this pull request changes.

### Related Issue

Fixes # (issue number)

If this PR addresses multiple issues, list them all:
- Fixes #123
- Related to #456

### Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting change
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test addition/update
- [ ] 🗑️ Chore (maintenance, dependencies, etc.)

## 🧪 Testing

### How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Template testing with AI tools

**Test Configuration**:
- OpenClaw Version: [e.g., 2.0.0]
- Node.js Version: [e.g., 18.0.0]
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14.0]

### Test Results

## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have checked my code for spelling errors

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have added/updated inline documentation
- [ ] I have updated template files (if adding/modifying templates)

### Git
- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) specification
- [ ] I have rebased my branch on top of the latest main branch
- [ ] I have squashed related commits

## 📝 Commit Message

Please ensure your commit message follows this format:

```
<type>(<scope>): <subject>

<body>

<footer>
```

**Types**: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore

**Example**:
```
feat(templates): add Firebase authentication template

- Add email/password auth template
- Add social login template
- Include testing examples

Closes #123
```

---

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] I understand this may be modified or rejected by maintainers
- [ ] I will respond to feedback in a timely manner

---

**For Maintainers:**

- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Ready to merge
